title: Braised Beef Stew
description: A hearty Brazilian-inspired stew made with tender beef and rich flavors. Serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to the pot and cook until onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes, beef broth, stew seasoning, salt, and pepper to the pot. Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Braise for 2.5 hours or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
